dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Yonggang High. A name that strikes fear into the hearts of students across the city. Not for its academic prowess, but for its… unique student body.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: This is it. Yonggang High.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: My last chance. My only chance.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: MURMURS. JEERS. DISTANT SHOUTS.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: (Looking around at the intimidating students) The rumors weren't exaggerated. Every single person here looks like they could snap me in half.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: But I can't back down. Not now. I promised Mom. I promised myself.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Yoon Gamin. A scrawny, unassuming boy with one goal: to get into university. A goal that seems laughably impossible in a place like Yonggang.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: Okay, first things first. Find a quiet spot. Somewhere I can actually… study.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP! CRASH!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Hey, watch it, nerd!

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: (Stumbling back as a desk is violently overturned) S-sorry!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: Look at this guy. Fresh meat.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: What's with the glasses, four-eyes? You think you're smart or something?

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: N-no! I just… I was looking for the library.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: The library? Hah! What's that, some kind of club for losers?

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: You hear that, Minho? He wants to read books! In Yonggang!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: LAUGHTER. SNICKERS.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: (My heart is pounding. This is exactly what I was afraid of. But I can't fight them. I can't afford to get expelled.)

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Let's see what kind of books you're into, huh?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RIP! PAGES TEAR.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: Hey! My textbook!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: Oops. Guess you won't be needing that anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: (Rage flares inside me. This is my future they're tearing apart. But I have to hold it in. I have to.)

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: Please… just leave me alone.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: And what if we don't, huh? What are you gonna do about it, little study bug?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHOVE! Gamin stumbles.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: (My hands are clenched. My knuckles are white. This isn't how it's supposed to be. I just want to study.)

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Look at him, shaking like a leaf. Pathetic.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: Let's go. He's not even worth the effort.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS RECEDE. LAUGHTER FADES.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: (Collapsing against the wall, picking up the torn pages) Damn it… damn it all!

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: This is Yonggang. This is my reality now. But I won't let them win.

dialogue.speaker: Yoon Gamin
dialogue.line: I came here to study, and I will study. No matter what it takes. No matter who stands in my way.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: With a torn textbook and a burning resolve, Yoon Gamin's journey at Yonggang High had just begun. A journey where 'study' might mean more than just books.

summary: Yoon Gamin arrives at Yonggang High, a school notorious for its delinquents, with the sole goal of studying for university. He immediately faces the school's harsh reality when bullies destroy his textbook, but Gamin's resolve to achieve his dream only strengthens.
